narrative:
Massillon 6-A (precinct in Stark County) has 1,304 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
